summary: Ralplan consensus approved telemetry cleanup implementation. Plan updated after architect/critic loops and user approved executing with OMG Autopilot.
key_decisions: Use Option A: central registry plus staged producer/filter integration.
Protect core, sweep, and checkpoint-retention metrics by default.
Use canonical registry names only; no aliases/replacement mappings.
Add explicit metric group booleans, events group, filtering for JSONL/WandB, and tests.
